newExperienceMode.title: New Experience Mode
newExperienceMode.description: Adds pre-battle choices and higher stakes. Changes take effect on your next run.

coffee.title: Fancy a coffee? ☕😁
coffee.how_to_help: This game is a free, non-commercial fan project built in spare time.
coffee.donations: Donations are entirely optional — they help cover hosting costs and support the developer's time on new features. They are not a purchase of any Pokémon content.
coffee.supportForkDescription: Enjoying the new features? You can support the developer behind this fork too — always optional.
coffee.hope: Whether you donate or simply share the game with others, I hope you have fun!
coffee.supportNote: You're supporting a developer's work on a fan-made game — not buying anything from, or affiliated with, Nintendo, Game Freak, or The Pokémon Company.

credits.title: Credits & Acknowledgments
credits.feedback: If you'd like share feedback, reach out on
credits.inspiration1: This game was heavily inspired on the Victory Road Run from
credits.thanks1: For the help with data for some roulettes
credits.pokeapi: As a resource for this game's data and sprites
credits.bulbapedia: For their trainer's Sprites which are being used in this project
credits.images: All image contents of Pokémon and Pokémon related items are Copyright of The Pokémon Company.
credits.disclaimer: This is an unofficial, non-commercial fan-made game. It is not affiliated with, endorsed, sponsored, or approved by Nintendo, Game Freak, or The Pokémon Company. Pokémon and all related names, characters, and images are trademarks and copyrights of Nintendo, Game Freak, and The Pokémon Company; all rights belong to their respective owners. Any donations support only the development and hosting of this fan project and are not payment for any Pokémon content.
credits.endWords: Hope you can have fun with your friends and family playing this game :)

enhancedFork.title: Enhanced Fork
enhancedFork.description: This version adds new features on top of the original game. Source code on

stats.title: Statistics
stats.empty: Play a run to see your stats!

battles.title: Battles
battles.nemesisNone: You haven't lost a run yet!

luck.title: Luck & Wheel
luck.luckIndexHint: Actual Yes rate minus what the odds implied — positive means you're running lucky.

perGeneration.title: Per-Generation
perGeneration.none: No runs yet in this generation
perGeneration.noBreakdownYet: No Pokémon/type/nemesis breakdown yet for this generation — it starts tracking from your next run here.

firstLegendary.name: Myth Buster
firstLegendary.description: Catch a legendary or Paradox Pokémon.

perfectRun.name: Flawless Victory
perfectRun.description: Win a run without a single battle loss.

championEveryGeneration.name: Master of All Regions
championEveryGeneration.description: Defeat the Champion in every generation.

share.title: Share My Stats
share.text: Check out my Pokémon Roulette stats!

import.error: That file couldn't be imported — check it's a valid profile export.
import.unsupportedVersion: That profile was exported by a newer version of the app and can't be imported here.

reset.title: Reset Statistics?
reset.warning: This will permanently erase all your lifetime statistics. Your current run and Pokédex are not affected. This cannot be undone.

luck.title: Reset Luck & Wheel Stats?
luck.warning: This will permanently erase your luck and wheel statistics (spins, potions used, Team Rocket steals). Other statistics are not affected. This cannot be undone.

runHistory.title: Reset Run History?
runHistory.warning: This will permanently erase your run history log. Other statistics are not affected. This cannot be undone.

achievements.title: Reset Achievements?
achievements.warning: This will mark all achievements as locked again. If their underlying stats already qualify, they may unlock again immediately. This cannot be undone.

entei.prevents: Entei prevents Team Rocket from stealing your Pokémon.

gymBattle.potionDesc: Since no evolution was possible, get the best Potion your money can buy!

visitDaycare.eggDesc: The people from the Day Care gave you a Mysterious Egg!

battleRival.itemDesc: Your Rival said you only won by luck and gave you an Item!

battleTrainer.potionDesc: After the battle, the Trainer gave you a Potion!

teamRocket.itemDesc: Looks like Team Rocket is blasting off again! Oh, they left an Item!

snorlax.itemDesc: That Snorlax was holding an Item!

megaStone.stoneDesc: Tap a Mega Stone icon to activate Mega Evolution during battle!

foundCoins.title: Found some Coins!
foundCoins.desc: You pocketed {{amount}} Coins. Spend them at the Market!

danger.label: Danger
danger.relief: You slipped away — the heat's off, for now.
danger.help: The higher this climbs, the more likely your next step is a threat. Threats relieve it; a few safe steps let it climb back up.

character.gender: Are you a boy or a girl?

adventure.title: What do you do between Gyms?

itemTheft.title: Item Theft!
itemTheft.stolenItem: A thief made off with your
itemTheft.nothingFound: A thief rummaged through your bag but found nothing to take.

forcedRetreat.title: Forced Retreat
forcedRetreat.description: A threat forces one of your Pokémon to retreat to your PC box — it'll be locked there for your next battle.
forcedRetreat.pickPokemon: Which Pokémon retreats to your PC box? It'll be locked there for your next battle.

teamRocketAmbush.title: Team Rocket Ambush!
teamRocketAmbush.description: Team Rocket jumps out and blocks your path — you'll have to deal with them before you can continue.

badOmen.title: Bad Omen
badOmen.description: A chill runs down your spine — your next battle will be tougher than usual.

spooked.title: Spooked!
spooked.description: Something's rattled your nerves — the road ahead feels more dangerous than it did a moment ago.

markedTarget.title: Marked Target
markedTarget.description: A rival scout has tailed one of your team — it must lead your next battle:

pokeballMalfunction.title: Poké Ball Malfunction
pokeballMalfunction.description: One of your Poké Balls is acting up — the next Pokémon you try to catch might slip free.
pokeballMalfunction.escapeMessage: The faulty Poké Ball popped open —

tollBooth.title: Toll Booth
tollBooth.paidMessage: A toll gate blocks the road — you hand over {{paid}} coins.
tollBooth.shortMessage: A toll gate blocks the road — you scrape together {{paid}} coins, but coming up short rattles you (danger +{{spike}}%).

scoutingReport.title: Rival Scouting Report
scoutingReport.description: A rival scout studied your team — the next enemy came prepared with a {{type}} edge against your {{pokemon}}.

pcLockout.title: PC Lockout
pcLockout.description: A system glitch locks your PC — you can't withdraw or deposit any Pokémon until after your next battle.

battlePrep.title: Choose your lead
battlePrep.chooseLead: Pick the Pokémon that will lead this battle

prep.ready: Now get ready for the Elite 4.
prep.title: What do you do before the Elite 4?

abilityCapsule.title: Which Ability Capsule?
abilityCapsule.assignHint: Assign it to a Pokémon from your team or PC.

mega.who: Who will receive a Mega Stone?
mega.whichStone: Which Mega Stone will be awarded?

blaze.name: Blaze
blaze.description: +2 Yes when this Pokémon has a type advantage.

torrent.name: Torrent
torrent.description: -2 No when this Pokémon is at a type disadvantage.

overgrow.name: Overgrow
overgrow.description: +2 Yes when this Pokémon has a type advantage.

multiscale.name: Multiscale
multiscale.description: -2 No when this Pokémon is at a type disadvantage.

levitate.name: Levitate
levitate.description: Cancels this Pokémon's own type disadvantage.

swarm.name: Swarm
swarm.description: +1 Yes when this Pokémon has a type advantage.

rough-skin.name: Rough Skin
rough-skin.description: +1 Yes when this Pokémon has a type advantage.

synchronize.name: Synchronize
synchronize.description: +1 Yes per team member sharing a type.

sturdy.name: Sturdy
sturdy.description: This lead survives a would-be rival faint once per battle.

reckless.name: Reckless
reckless.description: +1 Yes and +1 No — high risk, high reward.

battle-armor.name: Battle Armor
battle-armor.description: -1 No per team member sharing a type.

justified.name: Justified
justified.description: +2 Yes when this Pokémon is at a type disadvantage.

last-stand.name: Last Stand
last-stand.description: +2 Yes while your team has 2 or fewer Pokémon.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.description: +1 Yes when this Pokémon's matchup is exactly neutral.

versatile.name: Versatile
versatile.description: +1 Yes if this Pokémon is dual-typed.

pure-power.name: Pure Power
pure-power.description: +1 Yes if this Pokémon is single-typed.

sheer-force.name: Sheer Force
sheer-force.description: Adds your type advantage again as Yes, up to +3.

comeback.name: Comeback
comeback.description: Turns your type disadvantage into Yes, up to +3.

marvel-scale.name: Marvel Scale
marvel-scale.description: -1 No when this Pokémon is at a type disadvantage.

market.title: Market
market.unavailable: The Market is closed during battle.
market.subtitle: Spend your coins to power up your team.

capsule.name: Ability Capsule
capsule.description: A random Ability Capsule — assign it to a team member in the PC for a permanent battle edge.

potion.name: Potion
potion.description: Potion let you spin again whenever you would lose a Gym battle !

rare-candy.name: Rare Candy
rare-candy.description: Use a Rare Candy to Evolve your Pokémon anytime !

bicycle.name: Bicycle
bicycle.description: The Bicycle lets you spin the wheel twice between Gyms !

super-potion.name: Super Potion
super-potion.description: Super Potion let you spin again up to two times whenever you would lose a Gym battle !

x-attack.name: X Attack
x-attack.description: X Attack makes your Team stronger !

exp-share.name: Exp Share
exp-share.description: Whenever a Pokémon evolves, Exp Share makes another Pokémon evolve !

hyper-potion.name: Hyper Potion
hyper-potion.description: Hyper Potion let you spin again up to three times whenever you would lose a Gym battle !

escape-rope.name: Escape Rope
escape-rope.description: Escape Rope saves you from bad situations !

honey.name: Honey
honey.description: Use Honey to steer your next wild Pokémon toward up to 3 types you choose — the wheel tilts so your picks make up about 55% of it (split across them). Works on a wheel already on screen, and stacks (up to ~75%) if used again.

repel.name: Repel
repel.description: Use Repel to steer your next wild Pokémon away from a type you choose — stacks if used again, and works on a wheel already on screen !

poke-radar.name: Poké Radar
poke-radar.description: Poké Radar guarantees your next wild Pokémon is a type you choose — works on a wheel already on screen !

max-repel.name: Max Repel
max-repel.description: Max Repel fully excludes a type you choose from your next wild Pokémon — works on a wheel already on screen !

link-cable.name: Link Cable
link-cable.description: Use Link Cable to trigger a trade offer right away !

revive.name: Revive
revive.description: Revive brings a fainted Pokémon back from storage, ready to rejoin your team!

abomasite.description: Allows a compatible Pokemon to Mega Evolve in battle.

team.markedTooltip: Marked Target: locked in — must lead your next battle and can't be benched or swapped.
team.coinsTooltip: Coins earned from wins, adventures and each round. Spend them at the Market on potions, X Attacks, Ability Capsules, Revives and Rare Candies.

storage.unavailableMessage: Team Rocket is jamming communications with the PC
storage.faintedTooltip: Fainted from a battle loss — locked in the PC until revived with a Revive item.
storage.retreatLockedTooltip: Benched here by a Forced Retreat threat — unlocks once your next real battle resolves.
storage.pcLocked: PC locked until your next battle

lorelei.name: Lorelei
lorelei.quote1: No one can best me when it comes to icy Pokémon.
lorelei.quote2: Freezing moves are powerful. Are you ready?

bruno-gen1.name: Bruno
bruno-gen1.quote1: Through rigorous training, people and Pokémon can become stronger without limit.
bruno-gen1.quote2: We will grind you down with our superior power! Hoo hah!

agatha.name: Agatha
agatha.quote1: You're the child that Oak's taken under his wing, aren't you?
agatha.quote2: I'll show you how a real Trainer battles!

lance.name: Lance
lance.quote1: You can call me Lance the dragon Trainer.
lance.quote2: Your League challenge ends with me!

will.name: Will
will.quote1: I am Will. I have trained all around the world, making my Psychic-type Pokémon powerful.
will.quote2: I can only keep getting better! Losing is not an option!

koga.name: Koga
koga.quote1: A mere child like you dares to challenge me?
koga.quote2: I shall show you true terror as a ninja master!

bruno-gen2.name: Bruno
bruno-gen2.quote1: You look determined. Perfect for battle!
bruno-gen2.quote2: You will bow down to our overwhelming power! Hoo hah!

karen.name: Karen
karen.quote1: How amusing. I love Dark-type Pokémon.
karen.quote2: I'm known for my overpowering tactics.
karen.quote3: Just try to entertain me. Let's go.

sidney.name: Sidney
sidney.quote1: I like that look you're giving me.
sidney.quote2: I guess you'll give me a good match. That's good!

phoebe.name: Phoebe
phoebe.quote1: Ahahaha! I'm Phoebe of the Elite Four.
phoebe.quote2: See if you can even inflict damage on my Pokémon!

glacia.name: Glacia
glacia.quote1: All I have seen are challenges by weak Trainers
glacia.quote2: I wonder what you will show me.

drake.name: Drake
drake.quote1: do you know what it takes to battle alongside Pokémon as partners?
drake.quote2: If you don't, you will never prevail over me

aaron.name: Aaron
aaron.quote1: Would you like to know why I take on challengers?
aaron.quote2: It's because I want to become perfect, just like my bug Pokémon!
aaron.quote3: Ok! Let me take you on!

bertha.name: Bertha
bertha.quote1: Well, well. You're quite the adorable Trainer!
bertha.quote2: Would you show this old lady how much you've learned?

flint.name: Flint
flint.quote1: You're facing a Fire-type Pokémon user with me.
flint.quote2: Let Flint see how hot your spirit burns!

lucian.name: Lucian
lucian.quote1: I must say, you've already proven yourself to be outstanding by coming this far.
lucian.quote2: I'm afraid I will have to go all out against you.

shauntal.name: Shauntal
shauntal.quote1: Excuse me. You're a challenger, right?
shauntal.quote2: I'm the Elite Four's Ghost-type Pokémon user, Shauntal, and I shall be your opponent.

marshal.name: Marshal
marshal.quote1: I'm training under my mentor, Alder.
marshal.quote2: My mentor sees your potential as a Trainer and is taking an interest in you.

grimsley.name: Grimsley
grimsley.quote1: Life is a serious battle, and you have to use the tools you're given.
grimsley.quote2: Let us begin. And may the best Trainer win!

caitlin.name: Caitlin
caitlin.quote1: You appear to possess a combination of strength and kindness.
caitlin.quote2: Make your best effort not to bore me with a yawn-inducing battle. Clear?

malva.name: Malva
malva.quote1: Welcome, challenger, to my Blazing Chamber!
malva.quote2: I am Malva, and I shall be your opponent today.

siebold.name: Siebold
siebold.quote1: I have a question I must pose to you.
siebold.quote2: Do you think Pokémon battling can ever be worthy of being called an art?

wikstrom.name: Wikstrom
wikstrom.quote1: Let us both give our word that our contest shall be fair and honorable.

drasna.name: Drasna
drasna.quote1: You must be a strong Trainer... That's just wonderful news!
drasna.quote2: Facing opponents like you and your team will make my Pokémon grow like weeds!

molayne.name: Molayne
molayne.quote1: Kukui asked me to, so I decided to be in the Elite Four.
molayne.quote2: I'm looking forward to battling against you and Sophocles in the Pokémon League.

olivia.name: Olivia
olivia.quote1: No introduction needed here. Time to battle me, Olivia!

acerola.name: Acerola
acerola.quote1: Nanu said he was not felling up to be an Elite 4
acerola.quote2: So I guess I'll just have to battle hard enough to make up for his not being here!

kahili.name: Kahili
kahili.quote1: I heard that they'd made a Pokémon League in my own home region, so I came flying back to serve Alola.

marnie.name: Marnie/Hop/Bede
marnie.quote1: The truth is... I really just wanna become Champion for myself! So don't take it personal when I kick your butt!
marnie.quote2: It's time I finish what I started that day... Got it? The one who'll become Champion is me!
marnie.quote3: It's time to prove I'm a notch above the competition to everyone in the Galar region.

nessa.name: Nessa
nessa.quote1: I'm sure you remember, but I'm Nessa. And I'm not here to chat. I'm here to win!

bea.name: Bea/Allister
bea.quote1: Focusing too much on winning can cause one to make mistakes. I will face you with a clear head!

raihan.name: Raihan
raihan.quote1: You're really something else, kid. You've made it all the way here!
raihan.quote2: You might be thinking that you beat me once already... But I'm not the same Raihan you faced before

rika.name: Rika
rika.quote1: Let good ol' Rika be the first of the Elite Four to take you on!
rika.quote2: I'd say I'll go easy on you, but...I'd be lying! Think fast!

poppy.name: Poppy
poppy.quote1: It's so cool you made it this far! But this is where you say bye-bye!
poppy.quote2: I can't wait for you to meet my friends, so...here they come!

larry.name: Larry
larry.quote1: I serve as a member of the Elite Four too, yes...Unfortunately for me.
larry.quote2: Anyway, time to get to work.

hassel.name: Hassel
hassel.quote1: I am Hassel, the dragon guarding the final fortress of the Elite Test.
hassel.quote2: Prepare to learn firsthand how the fiery breath of ferocious battle feels!

brock.name: Brock
brock.quote1: Fine, then! Show me your best!

misty.name: Misty
misty.quote1: My policy is an all out offensive with Water-type Pokémon!

surge.name: Lt. Surge
surge.quote1: I tell you, kid, electric Pokémon saved me during the war!
surge.quote2: They zapped my enemies into paralysis!
surge.quote3: The same as I'll do to you!

erika.name: Erika
erika.quote1: ...Oh, I'm sorry, I had no idea that you wished to challenge me.
erika.quote2: Very well, but I shall not lose.

koga.name: Koga
koga.quote1: Very well, I shall show you true terror as a ninja master!
koga.quote2: Despair to the creeping horror of Poison-type Pokémon!

sabrina.name: Sabrina
sabrina.quote1: I had a vision of your arrival!
sabrina.quote2: I dislike battling, but if you wish, I will show you my powers!

blaine.name: Blaine
blaine.quote1: Hah! I am Blaine, the red-hot Leader of Cinnabar Gym!
blaine.quote2: My fiery Pokémon are all ready with intense heat!

giovanni.name: Giovanni
giovanni.quote1: So be it. This time, I'm not holding back!
giovanni.quote2: You shall face Giovanni, the greatest Trainer!

falkner.name: Falkner
falkner.quote1: I'll show you the real power of the magnificent bird Pokémon!

bugsy.name: Bugsy
bugsy.quote1: My research is going to make me an authority on Bug-type Pokémon!
bugsy.quote2: Let me demonstrate what I've learned from my studies.

morty.name: Morty
morty.quote1: It's said that a rainbow-hued Pokémon will come down to appear before a truly powerful Trainer.
morty.quote2: I believe that person is me!
morty.quote3: You're going to help me reach that level!

chuck.name: Chuck
chuck.quote1: I have to warn you that I am a strong Trainer training every day under this waterfall!
chuck.quote2: Come on. We shall do battle!

jasmine.name: Jasmine
jasmine.quote1: I'm Jasmine, a Gym Leader. I use the...clang! Steel type!
jasmine.quote2: They are very hard, cold, sharp, and really strong! Um... I'm not lying.

pryce.name: Pryce
pryce.quote1: I have been training Pokémon since before you were born. I do not lose easily.
pryce.quote2: I, Pryce - the Winter Trainer - shall demonstrate my power!

clair.name: Clair
clair.quote1: I am Clair. The world's best Dragon-type master.
clair.quote2: As a Gym Leader, I will use my full power against any opponent!

roxanne.name: Roxanne
roxanne.quote1: Now, would you kindly demonstrate how you battle with your Pokémon?

brawly.name: Brawly
brawly.quote2: So you want to challenge me? Let me see what you're made of!

wattson.name: Wattson
wattson.quote2: I, Wattson, the Leader of Mauville Gym, shall electrify you!

flannery.name: Flannery
flannery.quote2: No, I mean… I'm Flannery, and I'm in charge here!
flannery.quote3: I'm gonna, uh, demonstrate the hot moves we've honed in this land!

norman.name: Norman
norman.quote1: I will do everything within my power as a Gym Leader to win!
norman.quote2: You'd better give it your best shot, too!

winona.name: Winona
winona.quote1: I am Winona. I am the Leader of the Fortree Pokémon Gym.
winona.quote2: Witness the elegant choreography of my bird Pokémon and me!

liza-tate.name: Liza & Tate
liza-tate.quote1: Were you surprised? That there are two Gym Leaders?
liza-tate.quote3: This combination of ours... Can you beat it?

wallace.name: Wallace
wallace.quote1: Allow me to formally introduce myself. I am Wallace. The Gym Leader of Sootopolis.
wallace.quote2: Now, show me. Show me the power you wield with your Pokémon.

roark.name: Roark
roark.quote1: This is the Oreburgh Pokémon Gym! I'm Roark, the Gym Leader!
roark.quote2: As the Gym Leader, I need to see your potential as a Trainer.

gardenia.name: Gardenia
gardenia.quote1: You have a winning aura about you.
gardenia.quote2: So, anyway, this will be fun. Let's have our battle!

maylene.name: Maylene
maylene.quote1: I will do the best I can as the Gym Leader.
maylene.quote2: I take battling very seriously. Whenever you're ready!

crasherWake.name: Crasher Wake
crasherWake.quote1: My Pokémon were toughened up by stormy white waters!
crasherWake.quote2: Victory will be ours! Come on, let's get it done!

fantina.name: Fantina
fantina.quote2: But I shall win. That is what a Gym Leader does, non?

byron.name: Byron
byron.quote2: But that's no surprise. He still has much to learn.
byron.quote3: I, Byron, will take your challenge!

candice.name: Candice
candice.quote1: Sure thing! I was waiting for someone tough!
candice.quote2: It's all about focus! I'll show you just what I mean. Get ready to lose!

volkner.name: Volkner
volkner.quote1: Sigh... I'm Volkner, the Gym Leader.
volkner.quote2: I hope you're the Trainer who'll make me remember how fun it is to battle!

cilan-chili-cress.name: Cilan/Chili/Cress
cilan-chili-cress.quote1: So, um, if you're OK with me, I'll, um, put everything I've got into being, er, you know, your opponent.
cilan-chili-cress.quote2: Yeeeeooow! Time to play with FIRE!! I'm the strongest of us brothers!
cilan-chili-cress.quote3: What incredible luck for you--you get to battle the best among the three of us.

lenora.name: Lenora
lenora.quote1: The director of the Nacrene Museum and the Nacrene Gym's Leader is me! Lenora!
lenora.quote2: Well then, challenger, I'm going to research how you battle with the Pokémon you've so lovingly raised!

burgh.name: Burgh
burgh.quote1: My bug Pokémon are scurrying with excitement about getting to battle you.

elesa.name: Elesa
elesa.quote2: My beloved Pokémon and your Pokémon shall compete!
elesa.quote3: We're going to see whose star shines brightest!

clay.name: Clay
clay.quote1: Think it's about time to see fer myself what it is about yer skills that makes a Gym Leader like Elesa take such a shine to ya.

skyla.name: Skyla
skyla.quote1: Hee-hee! I've been waiting for you.
skyla.quote2: Did you enjoy flying with the help of the Mistralton Gym cannons?

brycen.name: Brycen
brycen.quote1: I'm Brycen... Pleased to meet you...
brycen.quote2: You appear ready to face a Gym Leader. Then... Bring it!

drayden-iris.name: Drayden/Iris
drayden-iris.quote1: Welcome. Thank you for coming. I am Opelucid Pokémon Gym's Leader, Drayden. I'm searching for now is a young Trainer who can show me a bright future. Perhaps you can show me that future, the way Iris has?
drayden-iris.quote2: Hi! I'm Iris, the amazing strong Gym Leader! Tell me... What Pokémon are you using? How will you fight? Ooh, I'm super curious, so let's just get started!

viola.name: Viola
viola.quote1: It's fantastic! Just fantastic! A great subject for my camera!
viola.quote2: My lens is always focused on victory--I won't let anything ruin this shot!

grant.name: Grant
grant.quote1: I've been waiting in eager anticipation! For a worthy challenger to appear!
grant.quote2: I hope you'll show me that your skill as a Trainer surpasses even mine.

korrina.name: Korrina
korrina.quote1: I'm not exactly sure, but I think Lucario is saying it wants to battle with you.

ramos.name: Ramos
ramos.quote2: My sturdy plants are a sign o' my strength as a gardener and a Gym Leader! Yeh sure yer up to facing all that?

clemont.name: Clemont
clemont.quote1: Let's both do our best in battle.

valerie.name: Valerie
valerie.quote1: Oh, if it isn't a young Trainer...
valerie.quote2: The elusive Fairy types may appear frail as a breeze and delicate as a bloom, but they are strong.

olympia.name: Olympia
olympia.quote1: A ritual to decide your fate and future.

wulfric.name: Wulfric
wulfric.quote1: Ice is both extremely hard and terribly fragile at the same time.
wulfric.quote2: Let's get this show on the road!

ilima.name: Ilima
ilima.quote2: My trial is held in Verdant Cavern. The trial of Captain Ilima.

hala.name: Hala
hala.quote2: I am Hala, the kahuna of Melemele Island.

lana-kiawe-mallow.name: Lana/Kiawe/Mallow
lana-kiawe-mallow.quote1: Hello. I'm Lana. I serve as the captain of Brooklet Hill.
lana-kiawe-mallow.quote2: I am Kiawe. My Marowak and I are students of the ancient dances.
lana-kiawe-mallow.quote3: I'm Mallow, one of the captains here! Your Pokémon look ready to cook with gas!

olivia.name: Olivia
olivia.quote1: Now you face the grand trial of the kahuna—me!
olivia.quote2: Get ready for your hardest Pokémon battle yet on Akala!

sophocles-acerola.name: Sophocles/Acerola
sophocles-acerola.quote1: Mm-hmm. I've gotta show Big Mo how strong I can be...
sophocles-acerola.quote2: My trial takes place at the abandoned site where the supermarket used to be.

nanu.name: Nanu
nanu.quote2: I'm an island kahuna, you know. Battle against me.

mina.name: Mina
mina.quote1: Have a battle against Captain Mina!
mina.quote2: Me and my team are all full-powered to the max!

hapu.name: Hapu
hapu.quote1: This is the first grand trial of Kahuna Hapu! I will battle you with everything that I have got!

milo.name: Milo
milo.quote1: Sure seems like you understand Pokémon real well.
milo.quote2: This is gonna be a doozy of a battle!

nessa.name: Nessa
nessa.quote2: No matter what kind of plan your refined mind may be plotting, my partner and I will be sure to sink it.

kabu.name: Kabu
kabu.quote1: Welcome! I am Kabu, the Fire-type Gym Leader.
kabu.quote2: The match is decided by which side is able to unleash their true potential.

bea-allister.name: Bea/Allister
bea-allister.quote1: Welcome, Gym Challenger. I'm Bea. Do you have an unshakable spirit that won't be moved, no matter how you are attacked? I think I'll just test that out, shall I?

opal.name: Opal
opal.quote2: Let me have a look at how you and your partner Pokémon behave!

gordie-melony.name: Gordie/Melony
gordie-melony.quote1: Hey there. The name's Gordie. Let's get this over with, Challenger!
gordie-melony.quote2: I am Melony. As you can clearly see, I've assembled a team of all Ice-type Pokémon. All righty, I suppose we should get started.

piers.name: Piers
piers.quote2: Get ready for a mosh pit with me and my party! Spikemuth, it's time to rock!

raihan.name: Raihan
raihan.quote1: You aim to defeat Leon... Do you have any idea just how high a hurdle that is?
raihan.quote2: As his greatest rival, I guess that I—Raihan—will have to show you!

katy.name: Katy
katy.quote1: Bug-type Pokémon hiding in foliage... Both are small and yet very powerful.
katy.quote2: Don't let your guard down unless you would like to find yourself knocked off your feet!

brassius.name: Brassius
brassius.quote1: We must begin creating our collaborative work of art!
brassius.quote2: I trust that you are ready? It is time for our masterpiece to take shape!

iono.name: Iono
iono.quote1: All righty, then! Who's ready to see me kick some butt?
iono.quote2: Let's get this show on the road! How strong is our challenger? I 'unno! Let's find out together!

kofu.name: Kofu
kofu.quote1: At the auction, we battle with buyin' and sellin'. At my Gym, we battle in a more traditional sense!
kofu.quote2: I'mma serve you a full course o' Water-type Pokémon!

larry.name: Larry
larry.quote1: My boss will dock my pay if I spend too much time chitchatting.
larry.quote2: Thank you for doing business with us today. I, Larry, will be at your service.

ryme.name: Ryme
ryme.quote1: Lest you forget it, the name is Ryme, and I'm known as the MC of RIP!
ryme.quote2: Dead or alive, let's make this a vibe!

tulip.name: Tulip
tulip.quote1: Makeup is like magic. Anyone can use it to change their appearance.
tulip.quote2: Allow me to put my skills to use to make your cute little Pokémon even more beautiful!

grusha.name: Grusha
grusha.quote1: Well, this is my job now...so don't take what I'm about to do personally.
grusha.quote2: Get ready to feel the icy bite of reality.

blue.name: Blue
blue.quote1: Let's check out our Pokémon! Come on, I'll take you on!

silver.name: Silver
silver.quote1: I too have a good Pokémon. I'll show you what I mean!

wally.name: Wally
wally.quote1: Please see how much my training has accomplished!

barry.name: Barry
barry.quote1: You aren't the only one who's getting tougher! I'll prove it to you! Let's go!

n.name: N
n.quote1: Let me hear your Pokémon's voice!

calem-serena.name: Calem/Serena
calem-serena.quote1: I'm a Pokémon Trainer, I want to see things that make Pokémon special.
calem-serena.quote2: My Pokémon and I will show you what makes us special!

gladion.name: Gladion
gladion.quote1: Battle me. I won't take no for an answer.

bede.name: Bede
bede.quote1: It's time to prove I'm a notch above the competition to everyone in the Galar region

nemona.name: Nemona
nemona.quote2: Let's have us a fruitful battle!

blue.name: Blue
blue.quote1: My teams can beat any Pokémon type.
blue.quote2: And now… I am the Pokémon League Champion!
blue.quote3: I'll tell you. I am the most powerful Trainer in the world!!

lance.name: Lance
lance.quote1: As the most powerful Trainer and as the Pokémon League Champion…
lance.quote2: I, Lance the dragon master, accept your challenge!

steven.name: Steven
steven.quote1: Traveling this rich land of Hoenn… Has it awoken something inside you?
steven.quote2: I want you to come at me with all that you've learned.

cynthia.name: Cynthia
cynthia.quote1: I'm so glad that you're the one who's challenging me today!
cynthia.quote2: I will accept your challenge with everything I've got!

alder.name: Alder
alder.quote1: I've really been looking forward to deciding who's the strongest Pokémon Trainer in the Unova region! Kiai!

diantha.name: Diantha
diantha.quote1: I can't wait to see what you and your Pokémon are capable of now that I know exactly what it is you've done already!

kukui-hau.name: Professor Kukui/Hau
kukui-hau.quote1: I don't really wanna be the Champion of the Pokémon League I made myself, but there's nothing wrong with wanting to take on the biggest and baddest Trainer there is, right?
kukui-hau.quote2: I really wanna have a serious battle against you! I really want to be able to win against you!

leon.name: Leon
leon.quote1: The time has come for you to battle it out until only the greatest challenger remains!
leon.quote2: So, on behalf of the chairman, allow me to say... let the Finals matches begin!

geeta.name: Geeta
geeta.quote1: The final test is a battle against me, the Top Champion.
geeta.quote2: Are you ready for your final test? I want to see the true measure of your talent!

v3_12_0.0: 🍯 Honey reworked: instead of a flat bonus, it now tilts your next wild Pokémon wheel so your chosen type(s) make up about 55% of it — recomputed live so the effect holds steady whether the pool is small or large.
v3_12_0.1: 🎯 Honey can now target up to 3 types at once (split across them), and stacks toward a 75% ceiling if used again — Poké Radar stays the only route to a guaranteed catch.
v3_12_0.2: 🏪 Honey is now sold in the Market for 45 coins.

v3_11_0.0: 🎯 Type-countering the opponent pays off more in the late game — the bonus from a favorable type matchup doubled, while late-round difficulty scaling eased, so Elite Four and Champion battles are a real fight instead of a coin flip.
v3_11_0.1: ⚠️ The same system cuts both ways — a badly mismatched team now pays a steeper price too, so bringing the wrong types into the endgame hurts more than before.
v3_11_0.2: ✨ Ability effects got stronger to keep pace with the bigger type-matchup swings — most flat Yes/No bonuses and the scale-with-advantage/disadvantage caps are bigger now.

v3_10_0.0: ⚔️ X Attack is stronger in tougher fights — its power boost now scales with how far you've progressed.

v3_9_0.0: 🚲 The Market now sells a Bicycle — a pricier, guaranteed extra threat-free adventure step, previously only found on the adventure wheel.
v3_9_0.1: 🪙 Potion, Super Potion, and Hyper Potion cost more, but are correctly tiered now (each bigger potion beats buying the equivalent in smaller ones); the random Ability Capsule got cheaper.

v3_8_0.0: 🚧 Three new adventure threats: Toll Booth drains Coins (or spikes the Danger meter if you can't fully pay), Scouting Report gives your next opponent a type edge against your strongest Pokémon, and PC Lockout freezes withdrawals and deposits until your next battle.
v3_8_0.1: 📈 Threats you draw are now filtered to skip anything that would have no effect on your current roster, and safe adventure steps recover the Danger meter a bit faster.
v3_8_0.2: 💬 Team Rocket Ambush and Forced Retreat now show an explanatory message like every other threat, instead of jumping straight into their screen.

v3_7_0.0: 🪙 Earn Coins from battle wins, adventures, and a small stipend each round.
v3_7_0.1: 🏪 Spend Coins at the new Market — potions, X Attacks, Ability Capsules, Revives, and Rare Candies to power up your team, any time outside battle.
v3_7_0.2: 🧬 Fixed a bug where a Mega Evolution could become permanent after reloading mid-battle, which blocked using any other Mega Stone.

v3_6_0.0: 📈 See your exact battle win chance before every spin, on both the prep screen and the spin screen.
v3_6_0.1: 🔍 The battle screen now shows every hidden threat that shapes the odds — round threat, bad omens, and ability effects — not just the type matchup.

v3_5_0.0: 🎯 Marked Target now forces that Pokémon to lead your next battle instead of barring it from leading — every other pick is disabled until the battle resolves.
v3_5_0.1: 🧬 Fixed a bug where a Pokémon's assigned ability was silently dropped when it evolved or mega-evolved.
v3_5_0.2: 💬 Ability, Marked Target, Fainted, and Forced Retreat badges on your team and PC Pokémon now show what they mean on hover or tap.

v3_4_0.0: 🎲 New Experience threats are now a single random draw instead of a 3-choice picker — a threat you got to pick between was never really a threat. Reward steps are unchanged, still choose-between.
v3_4_0.1: 📊 The Danger meter now stays visible throughout the whole stretch between fights, not just on the step where it's rolled. Hover or tap it for a tooltip explaining the mechanic.

v3_3_0.0: ☠️ New Experience adventure threats: the pool grew from 4 to 7, so a threat draw shows way more variety.
v3_3_0.1: 🏕️ 'Pay a Toll' is gone — replaced by Forced Retreat, which benches a weak-biased team Pokémon to your PC, locked there until your next battle resolves (win or lose).
v3_3_0.2: 🎯 Two brand-new threats: Marked Target bars one Pokémon from leading your next battle, and a Poké Ball Malfunction risks your next catch escaping.

v3_1_0.0: 🧬 Abilities are now something you build: no longer locked to a species, a roster of 30 is looted as ability capsules and assigned to any Pokémon from the PC (New Experience Mode).
v3_1_0.1: 🎡 A new 'Find an Ability Capsule' adventure reward spins up one specific capsule — odds-shifters like Blaze and Intimidate, team-synergy and comeback effects, or Sturdy's once-per-battle faint save.
v3_1_0.2: 🔁 Assign and re-assign freely: applying a capsule overwrites a Pokémon's ability and consumes it, so who gets what stays a real choice. Classic mode is unaffected.

v3_0_0.0: ⚔️ New opt-in 'New Experience Mode' setting: every battle now opens with a prep step — pick which Pokémon leads the fight (doubling its type-matchup swing) before you see the odds.
v3_0_0.1: 🎒 In New Experience Mode, spend an X Attack or a potion before the wheel spins instead of only reacting to a loss — X Attack is now a one-time, consumed boost instead of a passive always-on bonus.
v3_0_0.2: 🤺 Rival battles gained a retry/potion mechanic (matching gym/Elite Four/Champion) in New Experience Mode. Classic mode is entirely unaffected — off by default, opt in from Settings.
v3_0_0.3: 🗺️ Also in New Experience Mode: the adventure step between fights now offers 3 choices instead of a single spin, paced by a Danger meter that climbs the longer you go without trouble and drops after every threat.
v3_0_0.4: ⚠️ New threats can turn up between fights: a Team Rocket ambush, an item theft, a toll (hand over an item — or, empty-handed, a weaker team member), or a bad omen that makes just your next battle tougher.
v3_0_0.5: ✨ Type-bias items (Honey, Repel, Poké Radar, Max Repel) now show their effect right on the wheel — boosted types get a bright outline, steered-away types get dimmed.
v3_0_0.6: 🌟 Also in New Experience Mode: 18 curated Pokémon abilities (one per type, like Charizard's Blaze or Gengar's Levitate) now shift battle odds if that species is on your team — shown as a badge next to the matchup strip.
v3_0_0.7: 💀 Rival battles now have real stakes: a loss faints your chosen lead instead of being free. It's pulled to the PC, greyed out, until revived with a new, rare Revive item. Classic mode is unaffected.

v2_2_0.0: 🍯 Type-bias items now stack when reused, and can be applied to a catch/trade/obtain wheel already on screen — odds update live.
v2_2_0.1: ⚖️ Rebalanced the odds: catching Pokémon dominates the early wheels, potions are scarcer, Team Rocket is a real threat, and battles get tougher the further you go.
v2_2_0.2: 🍯 Honey/Repel pack a much stronger punch per use — and a Honey and a Repel used on the same type now cancel each other out instead of barely affecting the odds.

v2_1_0.0: ⚔️ Reworked battle matchups — now graded and rewarding defensive resistances, not just offense.
v2_1_0.1: 📊 New Statistics page: wins, streaks, most-owned & signature Pokémon, your nemesis, and luck tracking.
v2_1_0.2: 📈 Run history with win-rate trends, achievements, and per-generation stats.
v2_1_0.3: 💾 Export/import your full profile, or share a stats card image.
v2_1_0.4: 🔍 Full Pokédex with name search, plus power/type tooltips on your Pokémon.
v2_1_0.5: 👀 Opponent preview shows the next gym or Elite Four type while you build your team.
v2_1_0.6: 🎯 Type-bias items to steer your next catch, direct-pick trades, and smarter Team Rocket steals.
v2_1_0.7: 💿 Runs auto-save across reloads, plus new settings: volume, Fast Spin, restart, and a 'Go Straight' button.
